# HPD.ML.Transforms.ImagePixelExtractTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Extracts pixel values from an image byte array as a float tensor. Output shape: [channels, height, width] (CHW format for ONNX/PyTorch). Concrete implementation deferred to platform-specific image library.

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class ImagePixelExtractTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
